title: Vault-Secured Variable File
description: Write a playbook that uses a vault-encrypted variable (simulated with !vault syntax) for a database password, and references it securely.
starterCode:
---
# Write a playbook that:
# 1. Defines a 'db_password' variable using the !vault YAML tag
#    (simulate the encrypted value as a multiline string starting with $ANSIBLE_VAULT)
# 2. Creates a task using ansible.builtin.template that references {{ db_password }}
#    to write /etc/myapp/db.conf
# 3. Sets file mode to '0600' (owner-read-only) for security
# 4. Uses no_log: true on any task that prints or uses the password

- name: Secure database configuration
  hosts: dbservers
  become: true
  vars:
    # Add vault-encrypted db_password here
  tasks:
    # Deploy db config template
    # Use no_log: true
solutionCode:
---
- name: Secure database configuration
  hosts: dbservers
  become: true
  vars:
    db_password: !vault |
      $ANSIBLE_VAULT;1.1;AES256
      66386439653236336462626566653065
      37636661613639373937313637633233
  tasks:
    - name: Deploy database config
      ansible.builtin.template:
        src: db.conf.j2
        dest: /etc/myapp/db.conf
        owner: root
        group: myapp
        mode: '0600'
      no_log: true
hints: The !vault YAML tag marks a variable as vault-encrypted
mode: '0600' means only owner can read — critical for credential files
no_log: true prevents the task's parameters from appearing in output

validationRules.errorMessage: Use the !vault YAML tag to mark the encrypted variable
The vault value should start with $ANSIBLE_VAULT;1.1;AES256
Use ansible.builtin.template to deploy the config file
Add no_log: true to prevent secrets from appearing in logs
YAML is invalid — !vault tag requires proper indentation

simulatedOutput.success:
PLAY [Secure database configuration] *******************

TASK [Gathering Facts] *********************************
ok: [db1.example.com]

TASK [Deploy database config] **************************
changed: [db1.example.com]

PLAY RECAP *********************************************
db1.example.com : ok=2  changed=1  unreachable=0  failed=0

Note: Vault variables were properly decrypted. Sensitive data was not logged (no_log: true).
simulatedOutput.failure: Vault validation failed. Ensure !vault tag, $ANSIBLE_VAULT header, template module, and no_log: true are all present.
